intro_paragraph: Steve — these recommendations are not meant to replace your selections. You’ve done solid research and picked TVs with excellent picture quality at strong price points. This document highlights considerations specific to an integrated Control4 smart home — native IP control, dealer warranty support, mount serviceability, and long-term firmware commitment — that aren’t always visible on a spec sheet. We will support whatever you choose.
key_takeaway: Key Takeaway: We can deliver an all-Samsung package with native Control4 integration across every TV, dealer warranty support, included installation, and pricing in the same range as your current selections — with the added benefit of locked pricing and a single point of contact for everything.
c4_warning_text: Your current selections: 2× Hisense need 3rd-party Chowmain drivers ($100–200 total), 2× TCL 65" need IR flashers + wire runs, and 3× TCL 55" 4-Series have no C4 driver at all. That’s 5 of 7 TVs that cannot be natively controlled from your iPads. Based on our experience, third-party drivers and IR control create support issues that are difficult to resolve and compromise the integrated experience this system is designed to deliver. We strongly recommend native integration for every TV in the home.
packages_intro: All three packages use Samsung TVs with native Control4 SDDP integration, available through our dealer network. All packages include Sanus VLT7 mounts. Installation, mounting, Control4 programming, streaming setup, and menu optimization billed at standard service rates per the agreement. Pricing reflects current Samsung availability.

packages.name: Option 1 — Essential
packages.description: Samsung QLED across the board. Native C4, dealer support, best value.

packages.name: Option 2 — Recommended
packages.description: QD-OLED where you’ll notice it most (living areas), QLED in the bedrooms.

packages.name: Option 3 — Premium
packages.description: QD-OLED in every room. Best picture quality across the board.

packages_footnote: TV pricing is based on current Samsung availability and is subject to change. To lock in these prices, full payment for TV equipment is required at time of package selection. Symphony will purchase, receive, and store all units until the installation date. Installation, C4 programming, streaming setup, and Samsung menu optimization billed at standard service rates per the agreement. All packages include Sanus VLT7 mounts.
consumer_brand_warning: What this means for you: Every TV in this house will be wall-mounted. If a consumer-brand panel fails, getting service may require removing the TV and shipping it — or the service partner may decline entirely. With Samsung, Symphony handles warranty claims through our dealer network, on-site.
ceiling_mount_note: The Peerless-AV PLCM-2 ceiling mount for the Hearth Room remains as specified.
summary_callout: These are recommendations, not requirements. We will fully support whichever TVs and mounts you choose. However, based on our experience with third-party drivers and IR control in integrated homes, we strongly recommend native C4 integration for every TV to ensure the system performs as designed. If you’d like to keep your current selections, we will install them — but want to be transparent that Control4 controllability may be limited or inconsistent on non-native models.
next_steps: Review this document and let us know your preference or questions.
Select a package — or let us know if you’d like to adjust.
To lock current pricing, full payment for TV equipment is required at time of selection.
Symphony will purchase, receive, and store all units until the installation date.
Mount selection finalized during the lighting walkthrough with RMGC.
payment_terms: full payment for TV equipment is required at time of package selection
service_rates_language: billed at standard service rates per the agreement
